Spawns in cold and snowy biomes, these cuties can be tamed with seeds!
Slugs found in the ocean with a bouncy, sticky slime. Collect the slime with bottles, and collect the slugs with buckets!
Sleepy little bears shambling in the jungle and sleeping through the day. Thye can be bred with bamboo, or tamed with sweet berries. They do their best to scare neutral mobs.
Otters spawn in rivers, and will open clams to find hidden pearls. Clams can be fished in rivers, and these pearls make great necklaces.
Koi fish travel together in rivers, and can be palced in buckets. Large schools of them are said to bring good fortune.
Adorable and protective arachnids, tamed with dragonfly wings. Drops a special, springy silk for uniquely sticky recipes.
Dragonflies gather over rivers, and adore spider eyes. When tamed, they can even be given armor.
Leaf Bugs spawn in forest, look like leaves and oh boy do they love a good jig.
With a taste for rabbits, chickens and treasure, Ferrets make great buddies! Give them raw rabbit or chicken to tame them and then send them plundering!
Octopuses with large 'ears, these adorable cephalopod helps out drowning players in the Deep Ocean, and can be moved with buckets.
